items.text: Meta rolled out its own AI-content detection and labeling system, which The Verge's testing found notably less reliable than Google's SynthID watermarking.
items.text_zh: Meta 上线自研的 AI 内容检测与标注系统，但 The Verge 实测发现其可靠性明显不及 Google 的 SynthID 水印方案。

items.text: OpenAI's "Project Camellia" data center in Effingham County, Georgia secured a 3.2-gigawatt deal with Georgia Power, delivering electricity in phases from 2028 through 2032.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 位于佐治亚州 Effingham 县的"Camellia 项目"数据中心与 Georgia Power 签下 3.2 吉瓦供电协议，2028 至 2032 年分阶段交付电力。

items.text: Anthropic released the Claude Security plugin for Claude Code in beta, scanning code changes for vulnerabilities before commit or sweeping entire codebases.
items.text_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Code 安全插件 Claude Security 测试版，可在提交前扫描代码改动中的漏洞，也支持全代码库安全扫描。

items.text: Manus introduced Plan Mode, which plans before building to turn rough ideas into clear specs, so users no longer need a perfect prompt.
items.text_zh: Manus 推出 Plan Mode：先规划再动手，把粗糙想法整理成清晰的任务规格，用户不再需要写出完美提示词。

items.text: Google committed $40 million in AI tokens and cloud credits to the US Energy Department's Genesis Mission, opening DeepMind tools like AlphaEvolve and AlphaFold 3 to national labs.
items.text_zh: 谷歌向美国能源部"创世纪任务"承诺 4000 万美元的 AI token 与云额度，向国家实验室开放 AlphaEvolve、AlphaFold 3 等 DeepMind 科研工具。

items.text: The US Army reinstated AI usage limits after burning through its annual 100-million-token allotment on the Ask Sage platform within weeks of promising unlimited access.
items.text_zh: 美国陆军在宣布"无限量"AI 额度后仅数周，就烧光了 Ask Sage 平台一整年 1 亿 token 的配额，被迫重新设限。

items.text: monday.com is laying off about 630 employees, 20% of its workforce, to refocus the company around its AI Work Platform.
items.text_zh: monday.com 宣布裁员约 630 人（占员工总数 20%），将资源集中投向其 AI Work Platform。

items.text: GigaToken, a new open-source Rust tokenizer, claims roughly 1000x faster tokenization than Hugging Face tokenizers, exceeding 24 GB/s throughput on server CPUs via SIMD.
items.text_zh: 开源 Rust 分词器 GigaToken 借助 SIMD 优化，声称比 Hugging Face tokenizers 快约 1000 倍，服务器 CPU 上吞吐超 24 GB/s。

items.text: Alibaba unveiled Qwen-Image-3.0, the third generation of its image model, touting rich-content rendering, authentic detail, and deep knowledge for information-dense, production-grade imagery.
items.text_zh: 阿里发布第三代图像生成模型 Qwen-Image-3.0，主打富内容渲染、真实细节与深度知识，可生成信息密集的生产级图像。

items.text: Samsung is reportedly in talks to invest up to €1 billion in Mistral at a roughly €20 billion valuation, up from €12 billion less than a year ago.
items.text_zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，三星拟向 Mistral 投资至多 10 亿欧元，估值约 200 亿欧元——不到一年前这一数字还是 120 亿。

items.text: OpenAI is rolling out hard spend limits to all API accounts this week, letting developers cap API spending at a limit of their choice.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 本周向所有 API 账户开放硬性支出上限功能，开发者可自行设定 API 花费封顶额度。

items.text: HeyGen introduced companion mode, where its video agent pitches multiple angles, checks in with a storyboard, and sketches before rendering — directing a video instead of ordering one.
items.text_zh: HeyGen 推出 companion 模式：视频 Agent 会先提出多个创意方向、给出分镜与草图再渲染，把「下单式生成」变成「导演式协作」。

items.text: Xiaomi's MiMo Code AI coding tool will end its free-use phase on July 26, officially moving to paid usage.
items.text_zh: 小米 MiMo Code 官宣 7 月 26 日结束免费使用阶段，正式转入付费模式。

items.text: Nunchaku's 4-bit quantized diffusion inference is now integrated into Hugging Face Diffusers, cutting memory use and speeding up image-generation models in the mainstream library.
items.text_zh: Nunchaku 的 4-bit 扩散模型量化推理正式接入 Hugging Face Diffusers，主流库用户可直接获得更低显存占用和更快的图像生成速度。

items.text: Claude users can now query the Anthropic Economic Index — the lab's public dataset on AI usage across occupations — via a new connector in any conversation.
items.text_zh: Claude 新增 Anthropic 经济指数连接器，用户可在任意对话中直接查询这份关于各职业 AI 使用情况的公开数据集。

items.text: Startup Cactus open-sourced Cactus Hybrid, post-training Gemma 4 to emit confidence scores so on-device models hand off to the cloud only when unsure, matching Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.
items.text_zh: 创业公司 Cactus 开源 Cactus Hybrid：经后训练的 Gemma 4 为每个回答输出置信度，仅在不确定时切换云端大模型，整体表现比肩 Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite。

items.text: Simon Willison examined whether labs are 'pelicanmaxxing' — secretly optimizing for his pelican-on-a-bicycle SVG benchmark — citing a 48-combination study that found no evidence of gaming.
items.text_zh: Simon Willison 探讨 AI 实验室是否在"卷鹈鹕"——暗中针对他的"鹈鹕骑自行车"SVG 基准做优化；一项覆盖 48 种动物-载具组合的研究未发现刷榜证据。

items.text: SLAI T-Rex, topping Hugging Face's daily papers, details full-parameter post-training of DeepSeek-V4-family models on Huawei's Ascend SuperPOD, demonstrating frontier-scale training off Nvidia hardware.
items.text_zh: 登顶 Hugging Face 每日论文榜的 SLAI T-Rex 详解如何在华为昇腾 SuperPOD 上对 DeepSeek-V4 系列进行全参数后训练，展示了脱离英伟达硬件的前沿规模训练。

items.text: New paper 'Self Gradient Forcing' proposes native long-video extrapolation, letting video generation models extend clips well beyond training length without stitching, trending on Hugging Face papers.
items.text_zh: 新论文 Self Gradient Forcing 提出原生长视频外推方法，让视频生成模型无需拼接即可生成远超训练长度的连续片段，正在 Hugging Face 论文榜走热。

items.text: IBM's mainframe revenue fell 42% and shares dropped 25%, but CEO Arvind Krishna blamed AI-driven data-center cost inflation, insisting clients aren't abandoning the mainframe.
items.text_zh: IBM 大型机收入暴跌 42%、股价单日重挫 25%，CEO Arvind Krishna 归因于 AI 推高数据中心硬件成本挤占客户预算，坚称客户并未弃用大型机。

items.text: Hyundai said its plan to deploy over 25,000 Boston Dynamics Atlas humanoids is not part of wage negotiations with striking workers at its Ulsan complex.
items.text_zh: 现代汽车表示，部署超 2.5 万台波士顿动力 Atlas 人形机器人的计划，不在与蔚山工厂罢工工人薪资谈判的议题之内。

items.text: Kuaishou's Kling published a Kling MCP tutorial showing how to build a complete cinematic video workflow inside your favorite AI agent, from script to finished performance.
items.text_zh: 快手可灵发布 Kling MCP 教程，演示如何在你常用的 AI Agent 里搭建从脚本到成片的完整电影级视频创作工作流。

items.text: Samsung showed its first Gemini-powered Android XR smart glasses, designed with Gentle Monster and Warby Parker — audio-first with a camera, launching this fall.
items.text_zh: 三星首次展示与 Gentle Monster、Warby Parker 联合设计的首款 Gemini 智能眼镜：基于 Android XR、以音频交互为主、内置摄像头，今秋上市。

items.text: HeyGen launched Audio to Video: speak a script instead of writing it, and one API call turns your voice plus an image into a video, with batch support.
items.text_zh: HeyGen 推出 Audio to Video：不用写脚本直接说出来，一次 API 调用即可把你的语音加一张图片变成视频，还支持批量生成上百条口播。

items.text: Tripo co-hosted the 'Worlds in Action' hackathon with World Labs and PICO during SIGGRAPH week, pairing 3D generation with world models and XR hardware partners.
items.text_zh: Tripo 与 World Labs、PICO 在 SIGGRAPH 周联合举办 Worlds in Action 黑客松，把 3D 生成、世界模型与 XR 硬件生态聚到一起。
